collections.name: Kurtis
collections.description: Handpicked kurtis in luxurious fabrics — from breezy cottons to resplendent silks, crafted for the modern Indian woman.

collections.name: Sarees
collections.description: Exquisite sarees from the finest weaving traditions of India — Banarasi, Chanderi, and Kanjivaram, reimagined for today.

collections.name: Lehengas
collections.description: Statement lehengas for brides, bridesmaids, and festive occasions — adorned with zardozi, mirrors, and heritage craftsmanship.
